title: Quantum Machines Establishes Flagship Hub at Illinois IQMP
why:
- Quantum Machines is establishing a flagship hub at the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park (IQMP) to accelerate and scale fault-tolerant quantum computing.
- Quantum Machines’ platform supports any type of quantum processor, and more than half of the companies developing quantum computers rely on their technology.
- Their most advanced controller, OPX1000, will be hosted at the Park, deploying systems comprised of superconducting and spin qubits.
- Quantum Machines is partnering with the IQMP, Illinois EDC, Chicago Quantum Exchange, and others on workforce development initiatives to grow Illinois’ quantum talent pipeline.
- Chicago will host the 2026 Adaptive Quantum Circuits (AQC) conference, organized by Quantum Machines, bringing together leading quantum researchers and companies.
